title: lastrea pseudostenobasis
intro: Lastrea pseudostenobasis, also known as the Chinese maiden's hair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lastrea pseudostenobasis include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and providing relief from fever and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
